_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Initial blood glucose values after the 24 hour fast did not differ between groups, but HgbA1c was modestly lower in Nf1 +/− mice (4.62% ± 0.13% vs. 4.45% ± 0.15%; p -value = 0.02)
details: HgbA1c modestly lower (4.45% ± 0.15% vs. 4.62% ± 0.13%; p = 0.02) compared to WT mice
